issues.title: Enemy dealt 49 dmg (71% of 69 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 18 (seq 209), the enemy dealt 49 damage which is 71% of the player's 69 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 40 dmg (91% of 44 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 21 (seq 222), the enemy dealt 40 damage which is 91% of the player's 44 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 37 dmg (100% of 37 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 22 (seq 226), the enemy dealt 37 damage which is 100% of the player's 37 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 (knowledge_golem)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 74% with 22 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 73% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated with an overall accuracy of 73%, well above the 60% threshold. This suggests the player knew the material but the game's damage/healing balance is too punishing. Dying despite knowledge mastery feels unfair.
reproductionSteps: Review enemy damage scaling vs. healing/shield availability
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage or increase healing for players above 60% accuracy (canary system integration).

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 22 turns vs prev floor avg 3.3
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 took 22 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: knowledge_golem (boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 4 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 4. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (154 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
